name: Possession → Corners
explanation_snippet: When a possession-control team faces a compact block, wide play generates corners. Expect elevated corner volume.

name: Low Block Deflections → Corners
explanation_snippet: Low blocks absorb shots and deflect them behind — this mechanically inflates the corner count.

name: Low Block Stalemate
explanation_snippet: When defensive compactness dominates both ends, the match tends toward low goal volume and drawn outcomes.

name: Counter Attack vs High Line
explanation_snippet: High defensive lines are vulnerable to pace. Counter-attacking teams generate genuine goal threat through transitions.

name: Press Failure → Tactical Foul
explanation_snippet: Aggressive pressing that fails generates tactical fouls — cards risk elevates for the pressing side.

name: Pragmatic Manager → Win-1-0 Protection
explanation_snippet: Pragmatic managers shift to a lead-protection setup after scoring, reducing second-half goal volume and BTTS probability.
